title: GOOD MORNING, NIKHIL: Master Shot List
source_path: C:\Users\nikhi\Downloads\GOOD MORNING, NIKHIL - Master Shot List (1).md

screens.title: COLD OPEN
screens.art_visual_prompt: Hyper-kinetic, glitchy montage sequence. A garish "GOOD MORNING, NIKHIL" logo in giant 3D gold text dominates the screen. Rapid flash cuts: glowing Family Feud 'X's, falling Bachelor roses, a shadowy shark fin, flickering tribal torches, and a Maury envelope slapping onto a desk. It settles on Steve staring deadpan at the camera, while Jeff stands beside him, looking smugly at an invisible board.

audio_lines.speaker: STEVE
audio_lines.text: All right, final round\! We got the Nikhil family versus Jeff Goldblum, our returning champion. Go to Jeff: Name something you can do on the computer.

audio_lines.speaker: JEFF
audio_lines.text: Ahhhh... well I can tell you what you can do with a computer, Steve... you can suck on the mouse like a giant, pacifier.

audio_lines.speaker: STEVE
audio_lines.text: Oh my God. Oh my God, good Lord. Let's see it... Wrong again\!

audio_lines.speaker: JEFF
audio_lines.text: The board is just a little timid, Stevie. It fears desire.

audio_lines.speaker: STEVE
audio_lines.text: Keep playing with me. Keep playing with me and you're going to find out, Jeff Goldblum. Today, we are here to answer one question: how does Nikhil really come across?

audio_lines.speaker: JEFF
audio_lines.text: Survey says... inevitable, unknowable, and lightly caffeinated.

audio_lines.speaker: STEVE
audio_lines.text: Hit the music.

screens.title: WELCOME
screens.art_visual_prompt: A brightly lit, generic morning-show desk (think *GMA* but slightly cheaper). Steve sits with hands folded tight. Jeff stands slightly off-axis, completely ignoring the desk, holding a makeshift buzzer.
screens.ui_reveal: Explainer text ("You're about to go through 5 quick TV segments...") and Continue button.

audio_lines.speaker: STEVE
audio_lines.text: Welcome to Good Morning, Nikhil. You're about to flip through a few very normal television segments.

audio_lines.speaker: JEFF
audio_lines.text: Oh Stevie, I thought of something else you can do with a computer.

audio_lines.speaker: STEVE
audio_lines.text: oh God. No. Lord, no.

screens.title: WHO ARE YOU TO NIKHIL?
screens.art_visual_prompt: Camera zooms slightly on Steve. A clean, glossy lower-third graphic slides in: "MEET OUR STUDIO AUDIENCE.
screens.ui_reveal: How do you know Nikhil?" Multiple choice options and Stay anonymous toggle.

audio_lines.speaker: STEVE
audio_lines.text: First things first. How do you know Nikhil?

audio_lines.speaker: JEFF
audio_lines.text: Family, foe, witness, or lover.

screens.title: SHOW 1: FAMILY FEUD (TOP 3\)
screens.art_visual_prompt: The lighting violently shifts to the dark blues and yellows of a classic Family Feud set. The iconic board lights up behind them.
screens.ui_reveal: 3 blank input boxes slide onto the screen.

audio_lines.speaker: STEVE
audio_lines.text: Top three answers on the board. Give me three adjectives or short phrases that describe Nikhil.

screens.title: FEUD: STRONGEST ANSWER
screens.art_visual_prompt: Cut to Jeff. He's leaning in, eyes wide, pointing a finger triumphantly at the empty air. Cut back to Steve rubbing his temples.
screens.ui_reveal: Text area input ("Which of your 3 answers feels most true, and why?").

audio_lines.speaker: JEFF
audio_lines.text: Show me 'handsome'.

audio_lines.speaker: STEVE
audio_lines.text: Wrong game, Jeff. Which one feels strongest, and why?

screens.title: FEUD: NIKHIL TRADEMARK
screens.art_visual_prompt: Medium shot of both. Steve looks surprisingly impressed; Jeff looks vindicated.
screens.ui_reveal: Short text input ("Name a Nikhil trademark...").

audio_lines.speaker: JEFF
audio_lines.text: Name a thing he does so often it should come with theme music.

audio_lines.speaker: STEVE
audio_lines.text: That is actually a good one Jeff.

screens.title: COMMERCIAL BREAK: SPONSORED BY
screens.art_visual_prompt: Cheesy "Sponsored By" bumper graphic. A velvet-draped product pedestal is center stage, surrounded by low-hanging fog machine smoke. There is absolutely nothing on the pedestal.
screens.ui_reveal: Short text input ("What company, product, vibe, aesthetic, or brand...").

audio_lines.speaker: STEVE
audio_lines.text: This episode of Nikhil is brought to you by...

audio_lines.speaker: JEFF
audio_lines.text: A premium blend of polish, intensity, and lightly weaponized seduction just like someone I know.

screens.title: WHY THAT BRAND?
screens.art_visual_prompt: Extreme close-up of Jeff's face looking off into the middle distance, deeply moved by his own profound nonsense.
screens.ui_reveal: Text area input ("Why does that feel on-brand?").

audio_lines.speaker: STEVE
audio_lines.text: And why?

audio_lines.speaker: JEFF
audio_lines.text: We're all just shadows and dust Steve.

screens.title: SHOW 2: THE BACHELOR
screens.art_visual_prompt: Sudden channel change static. We are now in a candlelit mansion. Steve is holding a silver platter with three roses. Jeff is completely out of focus in the background, examining a prop suit of armor.

audio_lines.speaker: STEVE
audio_lines.text: Ladies, you know what time it is. It's the rose ceremony, and one of you is going home tonight. Three roses. One quality goes home.

screens.title: BACHELOR: SEND ONE HOME
screens.art_visual_prompt: Jeff wanders back into focus, whispering ominously. Steve glares at him, clearly wishing he were anywhere else.

audio_lines.speaker: JEFF
audio_lines.text: Every board has one weak square.

audio_lines.speaker: STEVE
audio_lines.text: This ain't no board, Jeff. Send one quality home.

screens.title: LIMO CONFESSIONAL
screens.art_visual_prompt: Interior of a dark, cramped limousine. Streetlights sweep across Steve's exhausted face.
screens.ui_reveal: Mad-libs style text input ("I never stood a chance...").

audio_lines.speaker: STEVE
audio_lines.text: In the limo ride home...

audio_lines.speaker: JEFF
audio_lines.text: On her way to the set of 90-Day Fiance. Say Stevie isn't that where -

audio_lines.speaker: STEVE
audio_lines.text: Complete the sentence.

screens.title: SHOW 3: SHARK TANK
screens.art_visual_prompt: Wide shot of an intimidating, dark warehouse set. One dramatic spotlight hits Steve. Jeff is leaning into the spotlight, frantically mashing a disconnected Feud buzzer.

audio_lines.speaker: STEVE
audio_lines.text: Shark, Nikhil just pitched his brain for 100% of your life savings. Are you in or out?

audio_lines.speaker: JEFF
audio_lines.text: You know I'll just wait until Aunt Demequa blows it, and then it'll go back to me and I'll steal the round.

audio_lines.speaker: STEVE
audio_lines.text: Do you know where you are

screens.title: SHARK FOLLOW-UP (Dynamic)
screens.art_visual_prompt: Tight angle on Steve leaning over a mahogany desk, staring piercingly into the camera.
screens.ui_reveal: Conditional short text input (IN terms or OUT hire).

audio_lines.speaker: STEVE
audio_lines.text: Finish the sentence.

screens.title: SHOW 4: SURVIVOR
screens.art_visual_prompt: Tone abruptly shifts. It's midnight. Crickets chirp softly. Steve is in a dimly lit bamboo hut, illuminated by flickering torchlight. Very calm, slightly grainy night-vision aesthetic.
screens.ui_reveal: Long text area \+ Audio Record button.

audio_lines.speaker: STEVE
audio_lines.text: Tribal council. Confessional booth. Just you and the camera.

audio_lines.speaker: JEFF
audio_lines.text: (Whispering) "So this is... Fast Money in the woods?

audio_lines.speaker: STEVE
audio_lines.text: (Whispering back, firmly) "No. This is the honest part.

screens.title: SHOW 5: MAURY
screens.art_visual_prompt: Harsh, bright daytime TV lighting. Cheap beige set chairs. Steve sits in one, utterly defeated. Jeff is proudly standing behind a portable chunk of the Family Feud podium he has somehow dragged onto the set. The emotional weight here is real, not a joke.
screens.ui_reveal: Two stacked text inputs (What he projects vs. What he actually comes across as).

audio_lines.speaker: JEFF
audio_lines.text: At last. Something you can do with a computer, Steve...

audio_lines.speaker: STEVE
audio_lines.text: No, Jeff. I can't do it.

audio_lines.speaker: JEFF
audio_lines.text: You have to read it, Steve. That's the job. That's why they hire you.

audio_lines.speaker: STEVE
audio_lines.text: I'm not even going to look at the board. And the envelope goes to...

screens.title: PRODUCER'S NOTES
screens.art_visual_prompt: A jarring shift to a behind-the-scenes control room view. Monitors frame the shot, a red "REC" light blinks. A digital clipboard graphic anchors the screen. Steve is strictly business.
screens.ui_reveal: Long text input ("What should Nikhil do more of/less of...").

audio_lines.speaker: STEVE
audio_lines.text: Final note from the control room.

audio_lines.speaker: JEFF
audio_lines.text: Fast Money?

audio_lines.speaker: STEVE
audio_lines.text: No. That's a wrap.

screens.title: CLOSING CREDITS
screens.art_visual_prompt: Golden text starts scrolling. Behind the text, chaotic, blurred B-roll plays of Jeff wandering onto other game show sets while Steve yells silently in the background.

audio_lines.speaker: STEVE
audio_lines.text: That's a wrap.

audio_lines.speaker: JEFF
audio_lines.text: Did I win?

audio_lines.speaker: STEVE
audio_lines.text: No.

audio_lines.speaker: JEFF
audio_lines.text: Did I remain champion?

audio_lines.speaker: STEVE
audio_lines.text: ...somehow, yes.

screens.art_visual_prompt: Pitch black screen. A single beat of silence. Suddenly, a solitary Family Feud podium light turns on, illuminating Jeff's face in the dark.
screens.ui_reveal: Cut to black immediately. Final App state loads.

audio_lines.speaker: STEVE
audio_lines.text: (Disembodied voice) "All right, Jeff. Last chance. Name something you can do on a computer.

audio_lines.speaker: JEFF
audio_lines.text: Ahhh.., you can shove it up your
